items.title: South African army arrive in crime hotspots to help tackle gangs
items.dek: The army has been deployed to five of South Africa's nine provinces for a year-long operation.
items.body: The army has been deployed to five of South Africa's nine provinces for a year-long operation.

items.title: Houston man sues Whataburger for allegedly putting onions on his burger
items.dek: This is unacceptable. Onions should not be in a facility that serves food. submitted by /u/afterbirthcum [link] [comments]
